MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - RACHEL FIAPOTO, TEL. NO. 658-1689, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS CALLED TWICE. ON THE FIRST CALL OF THE MATTER: DEFENDANT RACHEL FIAPOTO'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 22, 2009 BY THE COURT TO LOOK AT THE PROOF OF SERVICE WHICH THE COURT DOES NOT HAVE ANY COURTESY COPY. ON THE SECOND CALL OF THE MATTER, THE COURT TOOK THE MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR INSUFFICIENT NOTICE. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
